cases.assertion: Opening an attachment keeps the active task shell and selected queue anchor intact.
Audio opens through a chunked loading state that keeps summary and provenance visible.
Large transcript preview falls back to governed placeholder instead of detached browser handoff.
Repair-bound callback chronology stays visible with explicit step-up and repair chips.
Selecting an older chronology row publishes a thread anchor stub and can reset back to the latest event.
Attachment viewer and selected thread event survive same-shell task child-route transitions.
